name: Roper

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.text: The roper can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

text:
# Roper

*Large Aberration, Neutral Evil*

A stalagmite-shaped cave predator that reels in prey on sticky strands.

### Actions

**Bite.** Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 17 (3d8 + 4) Piercing damage.
